restaurant.tagline_en: Authentic Hong Kong Cha Chaan Teng
restaurant.address: Unit 130 · 6211 No. 3 Road, Richmond, BC V6Y 0A2

sections.description_en: Served all day. Choose your noodle: Macaroni, Spaghetti, Vermicelli, Rice noodle, or Instant noodle (+$0.50). Free Hot Coffee/Tea (Cold Drink +$1.50).
sections.description_zh: 自選：通粉、意粉、米粉、米線、出前一丁+$0.50。奉送熱咖啡/茶（凍飲+$1.50）

items.name_en: Pork Liver or Beef with Ginger
Pan-fried Chicken/Pork Chop in Green Onion Sauce

subsections.description_en: Served with tomato soup. Choose noodle in soup.
subsections.description_zh: 附蕃茄濃湯，可選湯內粉麵。

subsections.description_en: Comes with: Fried/Scrambled eggs + Salad / Toast / Hash brown / Bun. Upgrade: Pineapple Bun +$2.00 | Salted Veg Pork Vermicelli +$2.50 | Mini Ham Macaroni in Soup +$2.50.
subsections.description_zh: 配煎雙蛋/炒雙蛋 + 沙律/香草牛油厚多士/脆薯餅/牛油餐包。另加$2.00轉菠蘿包、加$2.50配雪菜肉絲米粉/迷你火腿通粉。

sections.description_en: Available from 11:00 AM. Free Hot Coffee/Tea (Cold Drink +$1.50). Add Fry Egg +$1.50 / Hash Brown +$1.50.
sections.description_zh: 11:00後開始供應。奉送熱咖啡/茶（凍飲+$1.50）。各式煎蛋+$1.50/脆炸薯餅+$1.50。
